lessonsLearned: Content Writer must NEVER perform arithmetic — always reference calculator tool output or source data directly
Title length 50-60 chars enforced with hard check; meta 140-160 chars same
Affiliate CTA must use '[BrandName] Pick' format, not generic 'Buy on Amazon'
All dangerouslySetInnerHTML must use '|| ""' fallback for undefined body content
next/head does not work in App Router — use generateMetadata() instead
Domains on Spaceship must change nameservers to ns1.vercel-dns.com for Vercel compatibility
Vercel --name creates new projects, not deployment aliases — avoid for multi-domain setups
